name: Central plaza fountain
description: A monumental fountain that anchors a plaza: a 5x5 (or 7x7) ring of cobblestone-wall basin around a single layer of water, with a 2-3 block @accent pedestal at the centre, a decorative water spout above the cap, four cardinal water spouts running down the pedestal sides, and four corner lantern posts that turn the pool into a 'Pool of Light' at night.

required_furniture.rule: Ring of `minecraft:cobblestone_wall` (or @secondary in non-medieval styles) at y0 — 5x5 on small AABBs (>=5x5), 7x7 when the AABB is >=7x7 on both horizontal axes.
Single-layer fill of `minecraft:water` inside the basin ring at y0, forming the visible pool surface.
1x1 column of @accent at (cx, cz), 2 blocks tall by default and 3 blocks tall when the AABB height >= 4. Rises out of the water.
A `minecraft:water` block placed one cell above the pedestal cap — the decorative spray at the very top of the monument.
Four `minecraft:water` blocks at y0+1, one in each cardinal direction next to the pedestal, simulating water running down the pedestal sides into the basin.
Four 2-tall @fence posts at the basin ring corners (y0+1..y0+2) capped with `minecraft:lantern` at y0+3 — only emitted when the AABB height >= 3.

placement_rules: Ring is always odd-sided (5 or 7) so the 1x1 pedestal sits exactly on the geometric centre.
Basin rim uses literal `minecraft:cobblestone_wall` in medieval style; other styles fall back to @secondary so the rim still reads as masonry.

Side spouts only emit on cells that are inside the basin interior (never on the rim itself); when the AABB collapses to the 5x5 minimum, the spouts sit one cell off the pedestal in each cardinal direction.
When AABB height < 3, the corner lantern posts are omitted (no vertical room for fence+lantern).
lighting_ventilation: Four corner lanterns at y0+3 satisfy the plaza's night-light budget on Java 1.16.5 and create the 'Pools of Light' effect over the water; the open horizontal layout provides full sky access and cross-ventilation.

medieval.notes: Cobblestone-wall basin, stone-brick pedestal, plain water — a village square fountain.

modern.notes: Smooth-stone basin and pedestal with iron-bar lantern posts; line the basin floor with glowstone for a clear, lit pool (set @floor to glowstone in the calling style pack so the water reads as illuminated from below).

fantasy.notes: Mossy-cobble basin with a purpur pedestal; swap the corner `minecraft:lantern` for `minecraft:sea_lantern` (set submerged under the water for the 'lit underwater' look) so the pool glows from within.

python_skill_signature: pipeline.skills.fountain.build(aabb: AABB, materials: Materials, style: str, **kwargs) -> list[Op]
